title: Clause (11) Personal Data Security A. All parties shall take the necessary organizational, administrative, and technical measures

evidence.raw_text:
Data Subject has the right to claim before the competent court for 
compensation for material or moral damage in proportion to the magnitude of the damage arising from the application of these Standard Contractual Clauses.  
 Clause (11) Personal Data S
evidence.clean_text: All parties shall take the necessary organizational, administrative, and technical measures that ensure to maintain the privacy of personal Data against any breach at all stages of processing, including personal data security during the transfer process.
